scripts.android:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:sync:emulator: set "VITE_API_BASE_URL=http://10.0.2.2:8787/api" && npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:run: npm run android:sync && npx cap run android
scripts.android:apk:debug: npm run android:sync:emulator && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleDebug
scripts.android:install:debug: npm run android:sync:emulator && cd android && gradlew.bat installDebug
scripts.android:apk:release: npm run android:sync && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleRelease
scripts.android:aab:release: npm run android:sync && cd android && gradlew.bat bundleRelease
